message:
test(search-core): add 82 tests for consistency, two_tier, updater, results, envelope, rollout

Coverage expansion for 6 search-core modules:
- consistency.rs: +14 tests (trait coverage, serde, edge cases)
- two_tier.rs: +22 tests (serde, boundary conditions, SIMD edge cases)
- results.rs: +17 tests (explain compositor, factor sorting, NaN handling)
- updater.rs: +8 tests (dedup, backpressure, flush semantics)
- envelope.rs: +11 tests (doc version, index key format, empty fields)
- rollout.rs: +10 tests (shadow comparison, Kendall tau, metrics snapshot)

Total search-core tests: 1104 (was 1022)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
